package rulefixtures

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"

	gin "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// scenario for misgrouped_imports: Import blocks that place stdlib imports after third-party imports.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: style; severity: info.
func scenario752Negative(ctx *gin.Context, w http.ResponseWriter) string {
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	return fmt.Sprint(ctx.FullPath())
}
